title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.050 - Oath — bond
text:
58.050.  Oath — bond. — All coroners, before they enter upon the duties of their office, shall take the oath prescribed by the constitution, and shall give bond to the state of Missouri, in the penalty of at least one thousand dollars, with sufficient sureties, residents of the county, conditioned for the faithful performance of the duties of their office.
(RSMo 1939 § 13228) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11609; 1919 § 5917; 1909 § 2922
